title: Inertia!
description: A camera overhaul with camera smoothing, vertical motion smoothing and tools to reduce motion sickness!
body:
# Inertia! ### Fluid Camera & Motion Overhaul [![Mod Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0.0-gold?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/inertia) [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-beige?style=for-the-badge&logo=fabric)](https://fabricmc.net/) **Bring fluidity and comfort to Minecraft.** *Remove the rigid stiffness of vanilla movement and eliminate motion sickness.*
--- ## 🌊 What is Inertia? Inertia! replaces the rigid, snapping camera of vanilla Minecraft with a silky-smooth, responsive system. **It removes the harsh micro-stutters and "stair-stepping" of vanilla movement, replacing them with fluid transitions.** It operates on a simple philosophy: *Gameplay should feel comfortable, not jarring.* - Hate the screen snapping when walking up stairs? **Smooth it out.** - Tired of micro-jitters from your mouse? **Filter the noise.** - Suffer from motion sickness? **Stabilize your view.** Designed with accessibility in mind, Inertia! makes Minecraft feel modern and fluid, giving you full control over how your camera handles. --- ## 🎥 Key Features Inertia! polishes the rough edges of the game engine without sacrificing the precision you need for gameplay. ### ☁️ Vertical Smoothing * **No More Stair-Stepping:** The camera glides smoothly when walking up blocks, stairs, and slabs, removing the rapid "snap" effect that causes eye strain. * **Softened Descents:** Falling feels less abrupt. The camera transitions smoothly downward, removing the jarring visual disconnect of rapid height changes. * **Cushioned Landings:** Instead of snapping instantly to the ground, the camera stabilizes gently upon landing, making movement feel continuous rather than jagged. ### 🖱️ Input Polish * **Fluid Aim:** Mouse movement is interpolated independently of the render rotation. * **Jitter Elimination:** This eliminates the "stepping" feel of high-DPI mice and low framerates while ensuring your aim remains accurate. * **Crosshair Sync:** Unlike cinematic cameras that misalign your aim, Inertia! ensures your crosshair always interacts with the block you are looking at. ### 🤢 Motion Sickness Relief * **Bobbing Separation:** Specifically designed tools allow you to decouple head bobbing (the camera shake) from hand bobbing (the walking animation). * **Jagged Terrain:** A custom smoothing curve removes the harsh camera snaps when navigating rough terrain. --- ## ⚙️ Configuration & Presets Inertia! is fully configurable via **Mod Menu**. Choose from tuned presets or customize every value to your liking. ### ☁️ Smooth (Recommended) Optimized for a fluid, modern feel. It eliminates micro-jitters and smooths out the harsh "stair-stepping" of vanilla movement. Perfect for players prone to motion sickness. ### 🍦 Vanilla Returns the camera to standard Minecraft behavior while keeping the mod active, allowing you to selectively enable specific features like "Bobbing Separation" manually. ### 🔧 Custom Want something specific? Inertia! gives you full control. Tweak vertical rise/fall speeds, mouse smoothing, and bobbing logic to create your perfect setup. --- ## 🔧 Technical Details Inertia! is built to be lightweight and compatible with modern rendering mods. * **Client-Side Only:** This mod is purely visual. You can use it on any server without it needing to be installed on the backend. * **Dependencies:** Requires **Fabric API**. **Mod Menu** is highly recommended to access the settings. * **Compatibility:** Fully compatible with Sodium and Iris.
